ddls:
CREATE TABLE "charging_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charging station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the charging station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the station is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the station is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the station's location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the station is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of charging spots available at the station */,
  "connector_types" TEXT /* Types of charging connectors available */,
  "ownership_type" TEXT /* Ownership type of the station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the station */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the station's website or additional information page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for availability record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "available_spots" INTEGER /* Number of available charging spots */,
  "total_spots" INTEGER /* Total number of charging spots */,
  "occupied_spots" INTEGER /* Number of currently occupied charging spots */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user or system that last updated the availability */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_availability_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for usage record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of charging sessions */,
  "total_energy_delivered" REAL /* Total energy delivered in kWh */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of charging sessions */,
  "peak_usage_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the station experiences the highest usage */,
  "low_usage_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the station experiences the lowest usage */,
  "total_sessions_per_hour" INTEGER /* Number of sessions per hour */,
  "total_sessions_per_day" INTEGER /* Number of sessions per day */,
  "total_sessions_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of sessions per week */,
  "total_sessions_per_month" INTEGER /* Number of sessions per month */,
  "total_sessions_per_year" INTEGER /* Number of sessions per year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for maintenance schedule */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance */,
  "assigned_technician" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assigned */,
  "expected_duration" TEXT /* Expected duration of the maintenance */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the maintenance */,
  "completed" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if maintenance is completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_assigned_technician FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_technician") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the third-party service */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was integrated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service integration */,
  "service_url" TEXT /* URL for the third-party service */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for integration with the third-party service */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last data synchronization */,
  "next_sync" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next scheduled data synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for service appointment */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the appointment */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assigned */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the service appointment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the service appointment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_appointments_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_appointments_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for service history record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date when service was performed */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service performed */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service performed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the service */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the service */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_history_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_history_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory item */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part or supply */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part in stock */,
  "warehouse_location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse storing the part */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Unique part number for inventory management */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the part was last restocked */,
  "next_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the part is expected to be restocked next */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level required */,
  "max_stock_level" INTEGER /* Maximum stock level allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the loyalty program */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user in the program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the user */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Total points redeemed by the user */,
  "reward_tier" TEXT /* Current reward tier of the user */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the user's EV */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the user's EV */,
  "vehicle_year" TEXT /* Year of the user's EV */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for payment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station where the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the reservation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "reservation_time" TEXT /* Time when the reservation was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation */,
  "reservation_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reservation */,
  "reservation_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reservation */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reservation was cancelled (if applicable) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the charging station */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "user_experience" TEXT /* User's overall experience */,
  "improvement_suggestions" TEXT /* Suggestions for improvement */,
  "service_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the service provided */,
  "cleanliness_rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the cleanliness of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES charging_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty or skill of the technician */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* List of certifications held by the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)
